sentence_templates.function: Pre-empts the 'expensive trick' objection by asserting the method is free of two typical overhead charges simultaneously.

verbatim_instances.quote: Identity shortcut connections add neither extra parameter nor computational complexity.
The shortcut connections in Eqn.(1) introduce neither extra parameter nor computation complexity.

sentence_templates.shape: Unexpectedly / Surprisingly / To our surprise, [finding that contradicts prior expectation].
sentence_templates.function: Frames a counter-intuitive empirical finding as a discovery rather than an error, raising reader curiosity and establishing novelty.

verbatim_instances.quote: Unexpectedly, such degradation is not caused by overfitting, and adding more layers to a suitably deep model leads to higher training error.
To our (and many of our initial readers') surprise, modern neural networks can achieve excellent accuracy on such a dataset classification task.
To our surprise, most models exhibit graceful degradation, and in some cases, they even perform better without noise conditioning.
Surprisingly, we observe that unstable ViT training may not result in catastrophic failure (e.g., divergence); instead, it can cause mild degradation in accuracy.
Training from random initialization is surprisingly robust; our results hold even when: (i) using only 10% of the training data

sentence_templates.shape: Conventional wisdom holds that [X]. [This work challenges this belief / We question this assumption].
sentence_templates.function: Opens a debate with the field, positioning the paper as a principled challenge to accepted practice rather than incremental refinement.

verbatim_instances.quote: Conventional wisdom holds that autoregressive models for image generation are typically accompanied by vector-quantized tokens.
It is widely believed that noise conditioning is indispensable for denoising diffusion models to work successfully. This work challenges this belief.
the belief that training from scratch is non-trivial became conventional wisdom

sentence_templates.shape: Our [method/approach] is simple: [one-sentence description of core mechanism].
sentence_templates.function: Declares simplicity as a first-class property before any technical detail; sets the tone that complexity is not a virtue here.

verbatim_instances.quote: Our MAE approach is simple: we mask random patches of the input image and reconstruct the missing pixels.
Our method is simple: we randomly mask out spacetime patches in videos and learn an autoencoder to reconstruct them in pixels.
Mask R-CNN is conceptually simple: Faster R-CNN has two outputs for each candidate object, a class label and a bounding-box offset; to this we add a third branch that outputs the object mask.

sentence_templates.function: Proves that a widely assumed dependency is unnecessary, strengthening the simplicity claim with a direct ablative statement.

verbatim_instances.quote: Without bells and whistles, Mask R-CNN outperforms all existing, single-model entries on every task, including the COCO 2016 challenge winners.
Without bells and whistles, our non-local models can compete or outperform current competition winners on both Kinetics and Charades datasets.
Our approach is self-contained and does not rely on any pre-training or auxiliary loss — no latent tokenizer, no adversarial loss, no perceptual loss

sentence_templates.shape: Is [claim] [necessary / possible / as simple as]? / We ask: what makes [X] different [between A and B]?
sentence_templates.function: Opens a section or paper with a precise, falsifiable research question, framing the work as an investigation rather than a proposal.

verbatim_instances.quote: Is learning better networks as easy as stacking more layers?
We ask: what makes masked autoencoding different between vision and language?
In this work, we aim to address the following question: Is it necessary for autoregressive models to be coupled with vector-quantized representations?
Is Noise Conditioning Necessary for Denoising Generative Models?

sentence_templates.function: Anchors a claim to empirical evidence rather than theoretical argument; signals the author values experimental falsifiability.

verbatim_instances.quote: We show by experiments (Fig. 7) that the learned residual functions in general have small responses, suggesting that identity mappings provide reasonable preconditioning.
We will show by experiments that the identity mapping is sufficient for addressing the degradation problem and is economical
We show by experiments that this formulation is key for good instance segmentation results.

sentence_templates.shape: The gap between [A] and [B] has been largely closed / [this] suggests that the gap … has been largely closed.
sentence_templates.function: Frames progress as closure of a known gap rather than isolated improvement, positioning the work relative to the field's aspirational goal.

verbatim_instances.quote: This suggests that the gap between unsupervised and supervised representation learning has been largely closed in many vision tasks.
These results show that MoCo largely closes the gap between unsupervised and supervised representation learning in many computer vision tasks
Our study substantially narrows the gap between one-step diffusion/flow models and their multi-step predecessors

sentence_templates.shape: This [result / observation / behavior] suggests that [broader implication].
sentence_templates.function: Generalizes a specific experimental outcome to a principle, without overstating the claim.

verbatim_instances.quote: This strong evidence shows that the residual learning principle is generic, and we expect that it is applicable in other vision and non-vision problems.
This behavior suggests that the neural network attempts to discover dataset-specific patterns—a form of bias—to solve the dataset classification task.
These observations are aligned with those witnessed in self-supervised pre-training in NLP and we hope that they will enable our field to explore a similar trajectory.

sentence_templates.shape: We observe that [phenomenon]. We hypothesize that [explanation].
sentence_templates.function: Establishes a disciplined inductive reasoning loop: observation first, hypothesis second; avoids reverse-engineering the story.

verbatim_instances.quote: We observe that instability is a major issue that degrades accuracy, and it can be hidden by apparently good results.
We hypothesize that it is desirable to build dictionaries that are: (i) large and (ii) consistent as they evolve during training.
We hypothesize that it is easier to optimize the residual mapping than to optimize the original, unreferenced mapping.

sentence_templates.shape: Our method is self-contained and requires no [pre-training / distillation / extra parameters / external data].
sentence_templates.function: Emphasizes autonomy of the method as a design virtue; signals that the contribution is not an engineering stack but a principled algorithm.

verbatim_instances.quote: Our method, termed the MeanFlow model, is self-contained and requires no pre-training, distillation, or curriculum learning.
Our method is self-contained and minimalist. In particular, it does not alter the implementation of the original loss term
Our approach is self-contained and does not rely on any pre-training or auxiliary loss — no latent tokenizer, no adversarial loss, no perceptual loss

sentence_templates.function: Summarizes multiple simultaneous contributions in a scannable, structured way, giving the reader crisp takeaways before the evidence.

verbatim_instances.quote: We show that: 1) Our extremely deep residual nets are easy to optimize, but the counterpart "plain" nets (that simply stack layers) exhibit higher training error when the depth increases; 2) Our deep residual nets can easily enjoy accuracy gains from greatly increased depth

It is based on two core designs. First, we develop an asymmetric encoder-decoder architecture … Second, we find that masking a high proportion of the input image, e.g., 75%, yields a nontrivial and meaningful self-supervisory task.

sentence_templates.shape: This [problem / effect] is not caused by [expected culprit], [evidence].
sentence_templates.function: Eliminates the most natural explanation via evidence, deepening the mystery and motivating the novel formulation.

verbatim_instances.quote: Unexpectedly, such degradation is not caused by overfitting, and adding more layers to a suitably deep model leads to higher training error

We argue that this optimization difficulty is unlikely to be caused by vanishing gradients. These plain networks are trained with BN, which ensures forward propagated signals to have non-zero variances.
the degradation of these models is caused by optimization issues, instead of representational abilities.

sentence_templates.shape: We hope our [simple / effective] approach will serve as a [solid / strong] baseline and help [ease / advance] future research on [topic].
sentence_templates.function: Positions the paper as infrastructure for the community rather than a competitive entry, simultaneously claiming generality and humility.

verbatim_instances.quote: We hope our simple and effective approach will serve as a solid baseline and help ease future research in instance-level recognition.
We hope this simple baseline will motivate people to rethink the roles of Siamese architectures for unsupervised representation learning.
We hope these improved baselines will provide a reference for future research in unsupervised learning.

sentence_templates.shape: We present a conceptually simple, flexible, and general [framework / approach / method] for [task].
sentence_templates.function: Uses three adjectives in ascending abstraction to assert both engineering simplicity and theoretical generality before any details.

verbatim_instances.quote: We present a conceptually simple, flexible, and general framework for object instance segmentation.
We present Momentum Contrast (MoCo) for unsupervised visual representation learning.

sentence_templates.shape: Our philosophy is to [deconstruct / transform] [X], [gradually / step-by-step] [changing / exploring] each component.
sentence_templates.function: Signals that the contribution is analytical understanding rather than a new design; licenses ablation as the core intellectual act.

verbatim_instances.quote: Our philosophy is to deconstruct a DDM, gradually transforming it into a classical Denoising Autoencoder (DAE). This deconstructive procedure allows us to explore how various components of modern DDMs influence self-supervised representation learning.
This paper does not describe a novel method. Instead, it studies a straightforward, incremental, yet must-know baseline given the recent progress in computer vision

opening_phrases.function: Opens by naming a field-wide assumption, then prepares to challenge it; signals polemic intent.

verbatim_instances.quote: Conventional wisdom holds that autoregressive models for image generation are typically accompanied by vector-quantized tokens.

opening_phrases.function: Crisp first-person ownership of the contribution; states action rather than motivation.

verbatim_instances.quote: In this paper, we address the degradation problem by introducing a deep residual learning framework.
In this paper, we analyze deep residual networks by focusing on creating a "direct" path for propagating information

opening_phrases.function: Minimal, declarative opening that immediately names the method and task; avoids motivational preamble.

verbatim_instances.quote: We present Momentum Contrast (MoCo) for unsupervised visual representation learning.
We present a conceptually simple, flexible, and general framework for object instance segmentation.

opening_phrases.function: Opens with an empirical claim rather than a methodological one; the surprise adjective (competitive, surprising, encouraging) sets tone.

verbatim_instances.quote: We report competitive results on object detection and instance segmentation on the COCO dataset using standard models trained from random initialization.
We report that simple Siamese networks can work surprisingly well with none of the above strategies for preventing collapsing.

opening_phrases.function: Frames the paper as an empirical investigation or demonstration, not a proposal; implies the result was discovered, not engineered.

verbatim_instances.quote: This paper shows that masked autoencoders (MAE) are scalable self-supervised learners for computer vision.
This paper studies a conceptually simple extension of Masked Autoencoders (MAE) to spatiotemporal representation learning from videos.
In this study, we examine the representation learning abilities of Denoising Diffusion Models (DDM) that were originally purposed for image generation.

opening_phrases.function: Opens with a widely accepted fact, then introduces a tension or qualification that motivates the work.

verbatim_instances.quote: Deeper neural networks are more difficult to train.
Scaling up autoregressive models in vision has not proven as beneficial as in large language models.

opening_phrases.phrase: We revisit / We take a renewed look at
opening_phrases.function: Signals that the paper re-examines a settled question using new tools or data, establishing relevance without claiming novelty of topic.

verbatim_instances.quote: We revisit the "dataset classification" experiment suggested by Torralba & Efros (2011) a decade ago, in the new era with large-scale, diverse, and hopefully less biased datasets
In this work, we take a renewed "unbiased look at dataset bias" (Torralba & Efros, 2011) after the decade-long battle.

opening_phrases.phrase: We propose a principled and effective framework
opening_phrases.function: Pairs "principled" (theory-grounded) with "effective" (empirically validated); claims both rigor and practicality simultaneously.

verbatim_instances.quote: We propose a principled and effective framework for one-step generative modeling.

opening_phrases.phrase: Despite [simple design / minimal inductive bias], [strong empirical result]
opening_phrases.function: The tension opener: concede structural minimalism, then claim surprisingly strong empirical outcome.

verbatim_instances.quote: Despite minimal inductive biases, our method achieves strong empirical results, suggesting that useful knowledge can be learned from data.
Despite its difficulty, pixel-by-pixel generation represents a broader class of important generative problems

opening_phrases.phrase: Motivated by [observation / analysis / prior work], we
opening_phrases.function: Anchors the contribution to an explicit motivation rather than asserting novelty; feels scientifically honest.

verbatim_instances.quote: Motivated by this, in this work, we systematically compare a variety of denoising-based generative models — with and without noise conditioning.
Motivated by its visual nature, we approach ARC from a vision-centric perspective.

transition_phrases.function: Pivots from a prior expectation or prior work's claim to a contradicting experimental finding.

verbatim_instances.quote: However, we find that using BN prevents the model from learning good representations, as similarly reported in [35]
However, we find that this is not the case when there are many Residual Units.

transition_phrases.function: Flags a result that is counter-intuitive even to the authors, inviting the reader to share the surprise.

verbatim_instances.quote: Interestingly, we observe that unstable ViT training may not result in catastrophic failure
Interestingly, our MAE with a single-block decoder can perform strongly with fine-tuning (84.8%).
Somehow surprisingly, when BN and ReLU are both used as pre-activation, the results are improved by healthy margins

transition_phrases.function: Draws a sharp structural or methodological contrast between the proposed approach and a foil.

verbatim_instances.quote: In contrast, a limited-capacity network can still predict the clean data, as it only needs to retain the low-dimensional information while filtering out the noise.
In contrast to the segmentation-first strategy of these methods, Mask R-CNN is based on an instance-first strategy.

transition_phrases.phrase: Based on [this observation / our analysis], we
transition_phrases.function: Explicitly chains evidence to action; ensures each design choice is visibly motivated by a prior finding.

verbatim_instances.quote: Based on this motivation, we present Momentum Contrast as described next.
Based on these experimental results, we discuss both the currently positive evidence as well as the challenges and open questions.

transition_phrases.phrase: This is not only [practical virtue] but also [scientific virtue].
transition_phrases.function: Elevates a convenience feature to a principled property, linking engineering benefit to conceptual clarity.

verbatim_instances.quote: This is not only attractive in practice but also important in our comparisons between plain and residual networks.

transition_phrases.phrase: It is noteworthy / It is worth noticing that
transition_phrases.function: Calls out a non-obvious detail that the reader might overlook; signals an important caveat or subtlety.

verbatim_instances.quote: It is noteworthy that the gating and 1×1 convolutional shortcuts introduce more parameters, and should have stronger representational abilities than identity shortcuts.
It is worth noticing that we evaluate a network's dataset classification accuracy by applying it to each validation image individually

transition_phrases.function: Re-ranks the contribution hierarchy mid-paragraph; flags that the following point is more significant than what preceded it.

verbatim_instances.quote: More importantly, the representations learned by MoCo transfer well to downstream tasks.
More importantly, Faster R-CNN was not designed for pixel-to-pixel alignment between network inputs and outputs.

transition_phrases.function: Concedes a potential weakness immediately, then proves empirically that it does not matter.

verbatim_instances.quote: Despite being a seemingly minor change, RoIAlign has a large impact: it improves mask accuracy by relative 10% to 50%

closing_phrases.phrase: We hope our [findings / work / method] will [motivate / inspire / encourage] the community to [rethink / revisit / explore]
closing_phrases.function: Closes by casting the paper as a stimulus for community reflection rather than a terminal solution; humble but assertive.

verbatim_instances.quote: We hope our discovery will inspire the community to revisit the foundations and formulations of denoising generative models.
We hope our discovery will stimulate discussions in the community regarding dataset bias in this new era.
We hope this work will motivate the use of autoregressive generation in other continuous-valued domains and applications.
We hope our simple and effective approach will serve as a solid baseline and help ease future research in instance-level recognition.

closing_phrases.phrase: We hope our [data points / experience / results] will be useful [for / to push this frontier]
closing_phrases.function: Deflects credit by framing the paper as communal resource; positions findings as useful data rather than final answers.

verbatim_instances.quote: We hope that this work will provide useful data points and experience for future research.
We hope our data points and experience will be useful to push this frontier.

closing_phrases.phrase: We hope this [work / framework / study] could open a new paradigm / provide a fertile ground for future research
closing_phrases.function: Signals the paper's ambition to be foundational, not just incremental.

verbatim_instances.quote: We hope this work could open a new paradigm in generative modeling and provide a fertile ground for future research.
We hope our findings and results will encourage future efforts to further bridge the scaling gap between vision and language models.

closing_phrases.phrase: We expect that [principle] is applicable in other [domains / tasks]
closing_phrases.function: Projects generalization potential without claiming it; hedges scope with 'expect' while broadening impact.

verbatim_instances.quote: we expect that it is applicable in other vision and non-vision problems.
We also report encouraging results of training on real-world, uncurated Instagram data.

closing_phrases.phrase: Code [has been / will be] made available at
closing_phrases.function: Closes the paper with a reproducibility commitment; implicitly signals confidence in the result.

verbatim_instances.quote: Code has been made available at: https://github.com/facebookresearch/Detectron
Code is available at https://github.com/LTH14/mar

closing_phrases.phrase: We invite the [community / field] to [study / explore / consider]
closing_phrases.function: Explicitly addresses the community as collaborators rather than competitors; broadens the call to action.

verbatim_instances.quote: We invite the vision community to study the ARC problem and to advance research on abstract reasoning.

verbatim_instance.quote: Our MAE approach is simple: we mask random patches of the input image and reconstruct the missing pixels.
We present a conceptually simple, flexible, and general framework for object instance segmentation.
In this paper, we present non-local operations as a generic family of building blocks for capturing long-range dependencies.
Our method, termed the MeanFlow model, is self-contained and requires no pre-training, distillation, or curriculum learning.
We observe that instability is a major issue that degrades accuracy, and it can be hidden by apparently good results.
We hypothesize that it is easier to optimize the residual mapping than to optimize the original, unreferenced mapping.
We propose a principled and effective framework for one-step generative modeling.
Training from random initialization is surprisingly robust; our results hold even when: (i) using only 10% of the training data
MoCo provides competitive results under the common linear protocol on ImageNet classification.
The MAE decoder is only used during pre-training … the decoder architecture can be flexibly designed in a manner that is independent of the encoder design.
we propose Dispersive Loss , a simple plug-and-play regularizer that effectively improves diffusion-based generative models.
Several intriguing properties are observed.
masking a high proportion of the input image, e.g., 75%, yields a nontrivial and meaningful self-supervisory task.
MoCo unsupervised pre-training can surpass its ImageNet supervised counterpart, in some cases by nontrivial margins.
In this work, we go back to basics and investigate the effects of several fundamental components for training self-supervised ViT.
Without bells and whistles, Mask R-CNN outperforms all existing, single-model entries on every task
Our method is self-contained and minimalist. In particular, it does not alter the implementation of the original loss term
In this note, we verify the effectiveness of two of SimCLR's design improvements by implementing them in the MoCo framework.
the MLP head and data augmentation are orthogonal to the frameworks of MoCo and SimCLR
We provide proof-of-concept experiments to verify this hypothesis.

vocabulary_use_with_evidence.word_or_phrase: as expected / as one might expect

verbatim_instance.quote: Given this, one might expect a complex method is required to achieve good results.
With a per-pixel sigmoid and a binary loss, they do not. We show by experiments that this formulation is key for good instance segmentation results.

vocabulary_avoid: novel (as a standalone adjective to mean 'new')
state-of-the-art (as a standalone adjective to mean 'good')
outperforms (as primary claim in abstract without a number)
significantly (as filler; use a number instead)
anti_patterns_kaiming_would_flag: Lead with motivation ('Deep learning has achieved great success...') before stating what the paper actually does.
Call your method 'novel' without showing it; let novelty be inferred from the gap between prior and proposed.
Claim 'state-of-the-art' without a concrete number — every number must appear next to its metric.
Use 'powerful' as an adjective for a model or representation without empirical evidence in the same sentence.
Bury the key design decision (e.g., stop-gradient, RoIAlign, asymmetric encoder) in a late paragraph; it must appear in the abstract or first paragraph of the introduction.
List ablations without a conclusion sentence — every ablation table must end with 'This suggests that...' or 'We conclude that...'
Write 'We propose X, which can Y and Z' without a result number; readers cannot evaluate the claim.
Avoid quantifying training cost or inference speed when claiming simplicity or efficiency.
Use passive voice to attribute a failure ('results degrade') when the agent is the design choice ('removing the stop-gradient causes collapse').
Write 'to the best of our knowledge' without following up with why this knowledge gap matters.
Stack hedges: 'may potentially sometimes be beneficial' — pick one hedge per sentence.
Use 'framework' and 'approach' interchangeably in the same section; choose one term and commit to it.
Open a comparison with 'unlike prior work' without citing the specific prior work being contrasted.

rewrite_recipes.from_pattern: We propose a novel X-based framework that achieves state-of-the-art performance on benchmark Y.
rewrite_recipes.to_pattern: Conventional wisdom holds that [assumption]. We observe that [empirical challenge to assumption]. Our method is simple: [one sentence description]. [Result with number] on [benchmark].
rewrite_recipes.rule: Replace generic novelty-claim opener with a tension-then-observation structure that anchors the claim in a specific empirical discovery.

rewrite_recipes.from_pattern: Our powerful model leverages [technique A] and [technique B] to improve results.
rewrite_recipes.to_pattern: [Method] adds neither [cost A] nor [cost B]. [Result with number].
rewrite_recipes.rule: Replace 'leverages' with a cost-free claim: prove the method is not a stacking game by asserting zero overhead explicitly.

rewrite_recipes.from_pattern: Experiments show our method outperforms baselines, demonstrating its effectiveness.
rewrite_recipes.to_pattern: We show by experiments that [specific mechanism] is the key factor. [Specific ablation result]. This suggests that [broader principle].
rewrite_recipes.rule: Turn a vague effectiveness claim into a mechanistic claim: cite the decisive ablation and derive the principle.

rewrite_recipes.from_pattern: In this paper, we present a comprehensive study of X for Y, where we investigate various aspects.
rewrite_recipes.to_pattern: This paper does not describe a novel method. Instead, it studies [specific must-know baseline] and reveals [specific finding].
rewrite_recipes.rule: When the contribution is an empirical study, say so explicitly and immediately; do not dress it as a method paper.

rewrite_recipes.from_pattern: To address this problem, we propose [technique], which significantly improves performance.
rewrite_recipes.to_pattern: Based on [observation], we propose [technique]. Without [prior requirement], [method] achieves [number] on [task].
rewrite_recipes.rule: Ground every design choice in a prior observation and pair each claim with a cost-elimination statement.

rewrite_recipes.from_pattern: Our framework is flexible and can be applied to various tasks and datasets.
rewrite_recipes.to_pattern: To demonstrate the generality of our approach, we instantiate [method] with [multiple architectures / tasks]. [Specific result in each].
rewrite_recipes.rule: Replace abstract generality claims with concrete instantiations; show don't tell.

rewrite_recipes.from_pattern: We hope this will be useful to the community.
rewrite_recipes.to_pattern: We hope our [simple/effective] approach will serve as a solid baseline and help ease future research on [specific topic]. Code is available at [URL].
rewrite_recipes.rule: Closing hope statements should name the specific downstream benefit and commit to reproducibility with a code link.

rewrite_recipes.from_pattern: The results are surprising, as the model performs well even in challenging scenarios.
rewrite_recipes.to_pattern: Surprisingly, [specific surprising result with number]. This suggests that [principle that explains it].
rewrite_recipes.rule: Surprise sentences must be followed immediately by a mechanistic interpretation; never let surprise stand alone without a hypothesis.

rewrite_recipes.from_pattern: Our method is simple and easy to implement in practice.
rewrite_recipes.to_pattern: Our method is self-contained and requires no [pre-training / distillation / external data]. [Implementation sentence in one line]. No sparse operations are needed.
rewrite_recipes.rule: Simplicity claims must be accompanied by an explicit list of eliminated dependencies; 'easy to implement' is not evidence.

rewrite_recipes.from_pattern: We conducted extensive experiments to validate our approach across multiple benchmarks.
rewrite_recipes.to_pattern: We evaluate [method] on [benchmark 1] and [benchmark 2]. Our experiments show that [finding 1] and [finding 2], suggesting [principle].
rewrite_recipes.rule: Replace 'extensive experiments' with the actual benchmarks and the specific things each experiment reveals.
